testcase.name: Serializer > all > returns all records
Serializer > where > returns exact matches correctly
Serializer > where > returns multiple matches correctly
Serializer > where > returns function matches correctly
Serializer > where > returns multiple condition matches correctly
Serializer > where > get first > returns the first record
Serializer > where > get last > returns the last record
Serializer > order > returns records in the correct order
Serializer > scope > returns the correct records with a single scope
Serializer > scope > returns the correct records with multiple scopes
Serializer > find > returns the correct record
Serializer > search > returns the correct record
Serializer > searchAll > returns the correct records
Serializer > serialize > returns serialized object
Serializer > serializeArray > returns serialized array
StringUtils > capitalize > should capitalize the first letter of a string
StringUtils > capitalize > should capitalize the first letter and lowercase the rest of a string
StringUtils > toKebabCase > should convert a string to kebab case
StringUtils > convertToValidId > should convert a string to a valid id name
StringUtils > convertToSeoSlug > should convert a string to a SEO slug
StringUtils > stripMarkdownFormat > should strip markdown format from a string
StringUtils > stripHtmlParagraphsAndLinks > should strip HTML paragraphs and links
StringUtils > stripHtmlTags > should strip HTML tags from a string
StringUtils > stripHtml > should strip HTML
StringUtils > normalizedTokens > should normalize tokens
StringUtils > escapeHtml > should escape HTML
StringUtils > formatTag > should format a tag
Collection > .main > returns main collection
Collection > .collections > returns collections collection
Collection > hasParent > returns false if no parent
Collection > hasParent > returns true if parent exists
Collection > isMain > returns true if main collection
Collection > isMain > returns false if not main collection
Collection > isCollections > returns true if collections collection
Collection > isCollections > returns false if not collections collection
Collection > isPrimary > returns true if primary collection
Collection > isPrimary > returns false if not primary collection
Collection > isSecondary > returns false if primary collection
Collection > isSecondary > returns true if secondary collection
Collection > rootUrl > returns the slug if it is a parent
Collection > rootUrl > returns the parent slug if it has a parent
Collection > siblings > returns siblings if it has a parent
Collection > siblings > returns an empty array if it has no parent
Collection > siblingsExceptSelf > returns siblings except self if it has a parent
Collection > siblingsExceptSelf > returns an empty array if it has no parent
Collection > firstPageSlug > returns first page slug
Collection > listedSnippets > returns listed snippets
Collection > formattedSnippetCount > returns formatted snippet count
Collection > pageCount > returns page count
Collection > allPageSlugs > returns all page slugs
Collection > allPageFullUrls > returns all page full urls
Collection > matchesTag > returns true if collection matches tag
Collection > matchesTag > returns false if collection does not match tag
Collection > pages > returns page objects with the correct snippet
ContentModel > slug > returns the slugified id
ContentModel > slugId > returns the last part of the slug
ContentModel > url > returns the slug for snippets
ContentModel > url > returns the first page slug for collections
ContentModel > fullUrl > returns the full url for the record
ContentModel > formattedDescription > strips html tags and paragraphs from the description
ContentModel > seoDescription > strips html from the description
ContentModel > isSnippet > returns true if the record is a snippet
ContentModel > type > returns the model name in lowercase
ContentModel > serializeAs > serializes the object using the specified serializer
ContentModel > context > returns the snippet context for snippets
ContentModel > context > returns the collection context for collections
Snippet > tags > returns tags
Snippet > hasLanguage > returns false if no language
Snippet > hasLanguage > returns true if language exists
Snippet > seoTitle > returns title if no language
Snippet > seoTitle > returns title with language, if exists
Snippet > seoTitle > returns title with formatted primary tag if language is JavaScript and primary tag is Node
Snippet > primaryTag > returns primary tag
Snippet > formattedPrimaryTag > returns formatted primary tag
Snippet > formattedPrimaryTag > returns formatted primary tag if special tag
Snippet > formattedMiniPreviewTag > returns article mini preview tag if no language
Snippet > formattedMiniPreviewTag > returns language name if language exists
Snippet > formattedTags > returns formatted tags
Snippet > formattedTags > prep});s language name if language exists
Snippet > formattedPreviewTags > returns formatted primary tag if no language
Snippet > formattedPreviewTags > returns language name if language exists
Snippet > githubUrl > returns GitHub URL
Snippet > isScheduled > returns false if not scheduled
Snippet > isScheduled > returns true if scheduled
Snippet > isPublished > returns true if published
Snippet > isPublished > returns false if not published
Snippet > isListed > returns true if listed
Snippet > isListed > returns false if not listed
Snippet > dateFormatted > returns formatted date
Snippet > dateMachineFormatted > returns machine formatted date
Snippet > hasCollection > returns false if snippet has no collection
Snippet > hasCollection > returns true if snippet has collection
Snippet > page > returns a page object with the correct snippet
BreadcrumbPresenter > breadcrumbs > returns the breadcrumbs for a snippet
BreadcrumbPresenter > recommendedCollection > returns the recommended collection for a snippet
CoverPresenter > coverUrl > returns the cover url for a snippet
CoverPresenter > coverUrl > returns the cover url for a snippet with full size
CoverPresenter > coverUrl > returns the cover url for a collection
CoverPresenter > coverSrcset > returns the cover srcset for a snippet
CoverPresenter > coverSrcset > returns the cover srcset for a snippet with full size
CoverPresenter > coverSrcset > returns the cover srcset for a collection
RecommendationPresenter > #recommend_snippets > returns snippets that are not the current snippet
RecommendationPresenter > #recommend_snippets > does not return the same snippet in another language
RecommendationPresenter > #recommend_snippets > does not return unlisted snippets
RecommendationPresenter > #recommend_snippets > returns snippets in the same language with the same tags
RecommendationPresenter > #recommend_snippets > returns snippets in the same language with similar tags
SublinkPresenter > sublinks > returns all primary collections for the main collection
SublinkPresenter > sublinks > returns all children for the primary collection
SublinkPresenter > sublinks > returns the parent collection sublink for the secondary collection
SublinkPresenter > sublinks > returns the parent collection sublink for orphaned secondary collections
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output content to the correct path
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output all content keys
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct language data > should output the correct number of languages
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct language data > should output the correct language objects
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct collection data > should output the correct number of collections
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct collection data > should output the correct collection ids
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct collection data > should produce a ranking between 0 and 1 for all collections
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct collection snippet data > should output the correct number of collection snippets
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct collection snippet data > should output the correct collection snippet objects for plain tag matchers
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct collection snippet data > should output the correct collection snippet objects for language matchers
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct collection snippet data > should output the correct collection snippet objects for language and tag matchers

ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct collection snippet data > should output the correct collection snippet objects for specific snippet ids > should output the correct collection snippets

ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct collection snippet data > should output the correct collection snippet objects for specific snippet ids > should output the collection snippets in the right order
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > should output the correct number of snippets
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > should output the correct snippet ids
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > should produce a ranking between 0 and 1 for all snippets
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > should produce a semicolon separated list of tags
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > should match to the correct languageId
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > should produce the correct listed attribute
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > should produce an HTML content and description
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > Markdown parsing > should highlight code blocks
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > Markdown parsing > should link inline code only if the language references match it
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > Markdown parsing > should safeguard only external links
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > Markdown parsing > should transform headings
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > Markdown parsing > should transform image paths
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > Markdown parsing > should wrap tables
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > Markdown parsing > should embed codepens from links
ContentUtils.prepareContent > should output the correct snippet data > Markdown parsing > should transform admonitions
Ranker.rankIndexableContent > should rank indexable content
Ranker.rankIndexableContent > should not exceed the keyword score limit
Ranker.rankIndexableContent > should not exceed the keyword count limit
TocReader.readToC > should read and build a table of contents from HTML
TocReader.readToC > should return undefined if no headings are found
splitTokens > produces the excpected resutls "a b c" -> a,b,c)
splitTokens > produces the excpected resutls "a-z0-9" -> a-z0-9)
splitTokens > produces the excpected resutls "a.b.c" -> a,b,c)
splitTokens > produces the excpected resutls "a.b - c d3" -> a,b,-,c,d3)
cleanTokenPunctuation > produces the excpected resutls "a" -> a)
cleanTokenPunctuation > produces the excpected resutls "-a" -> a)
cleanTokenPunctuation > produces the excpected resutls "a-" -> a)
cleanTokenPunctuation > produces the excpected resutls "-a-" -> a)
cleanTokenPunctuation > produces the excpected resutls "'a" -> a)
cleanTokenPunctuation > produces the excpected resutls "a'" -> a)
cleanTokenPunctuation > produces the excpected resutls "'a'" -> a)
cleanTokenPunctuation > produces the excpected resutls "-a'" -> a)
cleanTokenPunctuation > produces the excpected resutls "'a-" -> a)
deserializeTokens > produces the excpected resutls
parseMeta > parses simple delimited strings > "a title="my title" b" to [ { key: 'title', value: 'my title', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses simple delimited strings > "a title='my title' b" to [ { key: 'title', value: 'my title', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses simple delimited strings > "a title="my title" b label='a label' c" to [ { key: 'title', value: 'my title', type: 'string' }, { key: 'label', value: 'a label', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses simple delimited strings > "a "my title" b label='a label' c" to [ { key: null, value: 'my title', type: 'string' }, { key: 'label', value: 'a label', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses delimited strings with escapes > "a title="\"cool" b" to [ { key: 'title', value: '"cool', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses delimited strings with escapes > "a title="cool\"" b" to [ { key: 'title', value: 'cool"', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses delimited strings with escapes > "a title="cool\" and more" b" to [ { key: 'title', value: 'cool" and more', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses delimited strings with escapes > "a title="cool\\\" and more" b" to [ { key: 'title', value: 'cool\" and more', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses delimited strings with escapes > "a title="cool\\" and more" b" to [ { key: 'title', value: 'cool\', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses delimited strings with escapes > "a title="cool\\" "and more" b" to [ { key: 'title', value: 'cool\', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses delimited strings with escapes > "a title="C:\\App\\Data" b" to [ { key: 'title', value: 'C:\App\Data', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses delimited strings with delimiters and separators > "a title='= "wow!' b" to [ { key: 'title', value: '= "wow!', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses delimited strings with delimiters and separators > "a title="= \"wow!\"" b" to [ { key: 'title', value: '= "wow!"', type: 'string' } ]

parseMeta > parses delimited strings with delimiters and separators > "a title="= \"wow!\"" label='= "cool!' b" to [ { key: 'title', value: '= "wow!"', type: 'string' }, { key: 'label', value: '= "cool!', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses undelimited key-value pairs > "a b=wow c=cool d" to [ { key: 'b', value: 'wow', type: 'string' }, { key: 'c', value: 'cool', type: 'string' } ]
parseMeta > parses undelimited booleans > "a b c" to [ { key: 'a', value: true, type: 'boolean' }, { key: 'b', value: true, type: 'boolean' }, { key: 'c', value: true, type: 'boolean' } ]

parseMeta > parses undelimited booleans > "a b=true c=false d=TRUE e=fAlSe f" to [ { key: 'a', value: true, type: 'boolean' }, { key: 'b', value: true, type: 'boolean' }, { key: 'c', value: false, type: 'boolean' }, { key: 'd', value: true, type: 'boolean' }, { key: 'e', value: false, type: 'boolean' }, { key: 'f', value: true, type: 'boolean' } ]
parseMeta > parses simple ranges > "a b={1-4} c={3}" to [ { key: 'b', value: [ 1, 2, 3, 4 ], type: 'range' }, { key: 'c', value: [ 3 ], type: 'range' } ]

parseMeta > parses simple ranges > "a b={1-4} c={3} {2-4} {3,5-7} {2,5,8,12} {7 -8, 3,10- 11}" to [ { key: 'b', value: [ 1, 2, 3, 4 ], type: 'range' }, { key: 'c', value: [ 3 ], type: 'range' }, { key: null, value: [ 2, 3, 4 ], type: 'range' }, { key: null, value: [ 3, 5, 6, 7 ], type: 'range' }, { key: null, value: [ 2, 5, 8, 12 ], type: 'range' }, { key: null, value: [ 7, 8, 3, 10, 11 ], type: 'range' } ]
parseMeta > parses labelled ranges > "a b={c:1-4} c={d: 3}" to [ { key: 'b', value: [ 1, 2, 3, 4 ], type: 'range', label: 'c' }, { key: 'c', value: [ 3 ], type: 'range', label: 'd' } ]
parseMeta > parses labelled ranges > "a b={"c":1-4} c={'d': 3}" to [ { key: 'b', value: [ 1, 2, 3, 4 ], type: 'range', label: 'c' }, { key: 'c', value: [ 3 ], type: 'range', label: 'd' } ]
parseMeta > parses labelled ranges > "a b={"c:d":1-4} c={'d:e': 3}" to [ { key: 'b', value: [ 1, 2, 3, 4 ], type: 'range', label: 'c:d' }, { key: 'c', value: [ 3 ], type: 'range', label: 'd:e' } ]
parseMeta > parses labelled ranges > "a b={"\"c":1-4} c={'d\'': 3}" to [ { key: 'b', value: [ 1, 2, 3, 4 ], type: 'range', label: '"c' }, { key: 'c', value: [ 3 ], type: 'range', label: 'd\'' } ]

parseMeta > parses labelled ranges > "a b={"c{d}":1-4} c={'d{e}': 3}" to [ { key: 'b', value: [ 1, 2, 3, 4 ], type: 'range', label: 'c{d}' }, { key: 'c', value: [ 3 ], type: 'range', label: 'd{e}' } ]

parseMeta > parses labelled ranges > "a b={"c\"{d}":1-4} c={'d{e\'}': 3}" to [ { key: 'b', value: [ 1, 2, 3, 4 ], type: 'range', label: 'c"{d}' }, { key: 'c', value: [ 3 ], type: 'range', label: 'd{e\'}' } ]
parseMeta > parses regex > "a /^d{1,2}[a-z]+/ b" to [ { key: null, value: /^d{1,2}[a-z]+/, type: 'regexp' } ]
parseMeta > parses regex > "a b=/^d{1,2}\/[a-z]+/ b" to [ { key: 'b', value: /^d{1,2}\/[a-z]+/[a-z]+, type: 'regexp' } ]
